visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and purple-rimmed glasses sits at a green tabletop in a small eatery. She is wearing a white zip-up hoodie over a grey sports bra and has a black crossbody bag strap visible. She holds a blue and white pen in her right hand, hovering it over a densely packed pink and yellow menu grid. Behind her, the wall features a blue-framed whiteboard with small cards and a colorful world map. The lighting is bright and even, typical of an indoor restaurant environment. (2) The scene remains static in framing, but several digital graphic overlays appear around the woman's face. Blue cartoon tear-tracks are superimposed over her eyes, and multiple small white text boxes containing various Chinese characters (Variety-show style stickers) surround her head. She maintains a pouting expression with her mouth slightly open, looking down at the menu with an exaggeratedly sad or overwhelmed facial posture while continuing to move the pen slowly across the paper.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 為什麼台灣人吃早餐. (2) [Subtitle]: 可以不看菜單直接講. (3) [Subtitle]: 而我卻像在考學測. [Variety]: 痛苦面具. [Variety]: 5555.... [Variety]: 嚶嚶嚶. [Variety]: 難過. [Variety]: 委屈. [Variety]: 我哭了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a medium shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight black hair, wearing glasses, a white hoodie, and a grey inner top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A traditional local breakfast shop or eatery interior with maps and a bulletin board on the wall. A digital clock is visible in the top right corner.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with a clear, expressive Mandarin intonation, sounding slightly puzzled yet humorous. The speech rate is natural and engaging. Underneath the voice, a cheerful, mid-tempo electronic pop BGM plays with a consistent drum beat and bright synth melodies. The acoustics are clean, resembling a studio-recorded narration track with very low ambient floor. (2) A transition is marked by the introduction of a post-production sound effect: a high-pitched, comical 'crying' or whimpering vocal sound. The main female narrator's tone shifts to a mock-distressed, higher-pitched inflection to match the punchline of the script. The BGM continues unchanged, maintaining the lighthearted and rhythmic mood of the clip until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous comparison to highlight the cultural phenomenon of complex breakfast menus in Taiwan. It contrasts the locals' ability to order without a menu against the narrator's feeling of being overwhelmed, likening the process of choosing food to taking a difficult academic exam.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the juxtaposition of the serious 'exam-taking' visual of the woman and the exaggerated 'crying' effects to drive home the joke about the complexity of local breakfast shops.
